Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7874 "THEAMERICASCUP-7874" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "America's Cup, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The loading screen is based on the disk version from Electronic Arts.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $3CDF. However the true start address is $7874.
